message:
fix: Proper Float32Array buffer parsing (v1.5.2)

- Fixed binary blob to Float32Array conversion in database queries
- Properly handle buffer.length / 4 bytes per float
- Resolves vector dimension mismatch error in demo
- All ReasoningBank features now work correctly

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,14 @@ All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
 The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
 and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).
 
+## [1.5.2] - 2025-10-11
+
+### Fixed
+- **Critical:** Fixed Float32Array buffer parsing in database queries
+  - Properly convert binary blob to Float32Array (buffer.length / 4 bytes per float)
+  - Resolves "Vector dimension mismatch: 1024 vs 4096" error
+  - Demo and all ReasoningBank features now work correctly
+
 ## [1.5.1] - 2025-10-11
 
 ### Fixed
